privileged_info_summary: The task uses the built-in Fiji/ImageJ sample image 'Fluorescent Cells (400K)', a tutorial dataset containing red and green fluorescent channels (~400 KB file size). All three metadata paths are verified: output ratio image at /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/ratio_map.tif, mean value file at /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/mean_ratio.txt, and ground truth directory at /tmp/task_ground_truth. The task performs ratiometric analysis (Red/Green channel division) with masking and mean intensity measurement. Ground truth is generated by the setup script using headless Fiji to split channels from the sample image.
